CONCLUSION: Cross-validated: Liger + bassrehab + CCE ALSO fail to beat torch.compile on T4 (SwiGLU ~0.95-0.97x; CCE cannot run). Only MoE per-expert (data-dependent routing) wins. Not our incompetence — universal on T4+compile.

verdict: 10x slower but 2x less mem — pure memory-for-speed trade
REMOVED — catastrophic 0.08x on T4 (Ampere/Hopper-targeted); 2.7x less mem not worth 12x slowdown

FINDING: CE kernels (ours/Liger/CCE) all LOSE on time (0.08-0.42x) but Liger/CCE WIN big on memory (2-2.7x less) — pure memory-for-speed trade, only worth it when OOM-bound. Ours is BOTH slower AND more memory-hungry than Liger (2412 vs 972MB) — our CE is the worst of the CE kernels. MoE per-expert remains sole time-win. CCE removed (worst).
